answer_en:
Levator Scapulae m.
Elevation and downward rotation of the scapula at the scapulothoracic joint
Lateral flexion of the neck at the cervical spine (when contracting unilaterally)
Extension of the neck at the cervical spine (when contracting bilaterally)

details: Elevation and downward rotation of the scapula at the scapulothoracic joint
Lateral flexion of the neck at the cervical spine (when contracting unilaterally)
Extension of the neck at the cervical spine (when contracting bilaterally)
